home.operationsPausedDesc: You won't appear on the map until you resume.

send.title: Send
send.warning: Double-check the address. Blockchain transfers cannot be reversed.
send.scannerUnavailable: Scanner only available in the mobile app. Paste the address instead.
send.cameraPermission: Camera permission denied. Enable it in Settings or paste the address.

receive.title: Receive
receive.subtitle: Share your address to receive funds.
receive.scanTip: Show this QR or copy your address.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account and privacy
profile.deleteDesc: This action deletes your account and anonymizes your data. You cannot recover the account after confirming.
profile.deleteWarning: Before continuing, open the confirmation and type your exact username to enable deletion.
profile.importKeyDesc: Paste your Stellar secret key (starts with "S", 56 characters). It will replace the current device key.

cashout.title: Convert to cash
cashout.amountLabel: HOW MUCH CASH DO YOU WANT?
cashout.info: Enter the amount you want to receive. We'll find verified merchants nearby with immediate liquidity.

deposit.title: Buy with cash
deposit.amountLabel: HOW MUCH CASH DO YOU HAVE?
deposit.info: We'll find agents nearby who will give you digital assets in exchange for your cash. Funds are held in escrow until you complete the meetup.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.pollBanner: Notifications are disabled. Inbox updates every 30 seconds.

cetes.title: Tokenized CETES
cetes.subtitle: Mexican Government Bonds · Etherfuse
cetes.willReceiveSpei: You'll receive in your SPEI account
cetes.speiDeposited: MXN deposited to your SPEI account
cetes.connectBank: Connect your bank via SPEI to get started
cetes.footer: CETES tokenized by Etherfuse · Stellar Network · {{network}}
cetes.quoteExpired: The quote has expired. Please request a new one.

map.title: Convert to cash
map.feeExceedsWarning: Total cost exceeds {{maxPct}}%. Compare with another offer before continuing.
map.footerNote: Your balance is held in escrow until you confirm you received the cash. Secure operation protected by MicoPay's smart escrow.
map.locatingAgents: Locating agents available for your amount…
map.enableLocation: Enable location permissions to find agents near you.
map.checkConnection: Check your connection and try again.
map.noAgentsDesc: No nearby agent can handle ${{amount}} MXN right now. Try a different amount or later.

exploreScreen.title: Explore
exploreScreen.subtitle: Discover new ways to use your money
exploreScreen.cetesRateBadge: ~{{rate}}% annual · Backed by the Mexican government
exploreScreen.cetesDesc: Buy tokenized CETES directly from your wallet using XLM, USDC or MXNe. Etherfuse custodies them on-chain — sell anytime and get your pesos via SPEI or back to your wallet.
exploreScreen.blendDesc: Use your CETES or crypto as collateral and get liquidity in seconds — no giving up your assets, no paperwork.
exploreScreen.viewHowMuch: See how much I can borrow
exploreScreen.poweredBy: Powered by Stellar, Etherfuse and Blend

confirm.exceedsWarning: Total effective cost ({{pct}}%) exceeds the recommended {{maxPct}}%. Review before confirming, or go back to the map to pick another offer.

chatRoom.offerAccepted: ✓ Offer accepted · Balance locked in escrow
chatRoom.agentFoundTitle: Agent found · Digital assets in escrow
chatRoom.agentFoundDesc: The agent locked the assets you'll receive. Go to their location and hand over the cash.
chatRoom.viewMyQrAgent: View my QR for the agent

qrReveal.autoCancelNotice: If not confirmed within 30 min, the trade will be cancelled automatically and your funds will be released.

offline.title: No connection
offline.message: We couldn't connect. Check your signal and try again.
offline.action: Try again once you have signal.

unavailable.title: Service unavailable
unavailable.message: The service is busy or under maintenance. Try again in a few minutes.
unavailable.action: Wait a moment and try again.

timeout.title: Timed out
timeout.message: The operation took too long and couldn't finish in time.
timeout.action: Try again. Your funds are still protected.

invalidCredentials.title: Incorrect details
invalidCredentials.message: The username or key don't match.
invalidCredentials.action: Check your details and try again.

sessionExpired.title: Session expired
sessionExpired.message: Your session ended for security reasons.
sessionExpired.action: Log back in to keep using the app.

unauthorized.title: No access
unauthorized.message: You can't view this information with that account.
unauthorized.action: Log in with the correct account or request access.

conflict.title: The trade already changed
conflict.message: Someone else moved this trade before you.
conflict.action: Refresh the screen and check its status.

insufficientFunds.title: Insufficient balance
insufficientFunds.message: You don't have enough balance to complete this trade.
insufficientFunds.action: Try a smaller amount or top up your balance.

failed.title: Couldn't complete
failed.action: Try again. Your funds aren't lost.

cancelled.title: Trade cancelled
cancelled.message: The trade was cancelled before it finished.
cancelled.action: You can start a new trade whenever you like.

unavailable.title: Escrow unavailable
unavailable.message: We couldn't prepare the escrow right now.
unavailable.action: Try again. Your balance is still protected.

releasePending.title: Release in progress
releasePending.message: The escrow is still waiting for the next confirmation.
releasePending.action: Wait a few minutes or check your history.

invalid.title: Invalid code
invalid.message: The code can't be read or is no longer valid.
invalid.action: Ask for a new code and scan it again.

cameraDenied.title: Camera unavailable
cameraDenied.action: Enable the permission and try again.

scanFailed.title: Couldn't finish scanning
scanFailed.message: We couldn't finish reading the QR.
scanFailed.action: Adjust the camera and try again.

expired.title: Code expired
expired.action: Generate a new one to continue.

unreadable.title: We couldn't read the code
unreadable.message: The camera couldn't read the code.
unreadable.action: Adjust the camera or try with more light.

pending.title: Dispute in progress
pending.message: Your case is still under review.
pending.action: Wait for a response from the support team.

resolved.title: Dispute resolved
resolved.message: The dispute has already been closed.
resolved.action: Check your history to see the outcome.

pending.title: Refund in progress
pending.message: The refund is still on its way.
pending.action: Wait for the network to confirm the transfer.

failed.title: Refund couldn't be processed
failed.message: The refund couldn't be completed right now.
failed.action: Try again later or contact support.

fallback.title: Something went wrong
fallback.message: We couldn't finish this action. Try again.
fallback.action: If the problem continues, contact support.
